Collecting torch==2.4.0+cu121
Collecting torchvision==0.18.1+cu118
Collecting torchaudio==2.4.0+cu121
RuntimeError: Detected that PyTorch and torchvision were compiled with different CUDA versions. PyTorch has CUDA Version=12.1 and torchvision has CUDA Version=11.8.
Install matching torch, torchvision, and torchaudio wheels for the same CUDA runtime.
